Scroll

Process

Three steps.
One scroll-stopper.

No apps. No design tools. No agency. Just Telegram and a brief.

01 ✍️

Write Your Brief

Choose your platform and image style. Type your brief in plain language — CICI handles the rest. Type GO to generate.

02 ⚡

CICI Generates

Two unique images drop in under 60 seconds, plus three caption variations — Punchy, Conversational, and Storytelling.

03 🚀

Pick & Deliver

Pick your image, pick your caption. CICI applies your brand watermark and delivers the final file ready to post.

Capabilities

Built for real creators.
Not demos.

Every feature built from real creative workflows — not feature checklists.

🎬

6 Cinematic Styles

NOIR FRAME VOGUE SPREAD STUDIO LIGHT RAW LENS BOLD LINES ANALOG SOUL

Each a distinct visual language — updated constantly with new prompts.

Image Generation
✍️

3 Caption Styles

Every run generates Punchy, Conversational, and Storytelling captions simultaneously. Pick the one that fits the moment.

Copywriting
🎨

TWEAK & REDO

Not feeling it? TWEAK a specific image with a description. REDO regenerates both. Your creative control, always.

Creative Control
💧

Brand Watermarking

Upload your logo once. CICI applies it automatically to every delivery. Placement, size, and opacity all configurable.

Brand Identity
⚡

Quick Mode

Save your favorite style combo. Next time, type KEEP and your last brief, platform, and style pre-load instantly.

Speed
📈

Trend Research

Run /trends and CICI pulls live niche research via Tavily — surfaces trending angles for your next brief automatically.

Research
📅

Content Calendar

Every project is logged. Run /plan for a 7-day content calendar generated around your niche and brand goals.

Planning
🏷️

Multi-Brand

Switch between brand profiles mid-session. One account, multiple clients, each with their own logo, tone, and colors.

Agency Ready
📸

Product Photo Mode

Upload a product photo and CICI transforms it — studio, lifestyle, editorial, minimal, or dramatic treatment. No shoot needed.

Product
